sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26496" key="diekdikhth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεκ-δῐκητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n26496.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">defensor,</tr_> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.11.8.7a</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
